violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Limescale at edge of ice machine topper. -Residue at underside of handles of 2 door refrigerator at bisquit prep area. -Limescale at interior bottom of evaporator.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris/crumbs in cabinet below make line (tomatoes/lettuce, etc.).
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Slow drip at front hand sink faucet. -Drip leak at prep sink faucet.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Damaged floor tiles/grout at mop sink. -Gap/bubbled floor at walk in cooler. -Worn/disintegrating floor mat at ice machine.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Residue along bottom edge of soda machine ice chute.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Debris at top of lid storing bacon in biscuit refrigerator. -Residue at interior wire shelves at biscuit station. -Flour/dust debris at plastic drawers near cook line. -Limescale at catch tray of evaporator. -Residue behind cookline microwaves. -Frost build up at interior side surfaces of broiler freezer and in tong container (in freezer). -Food crumb/debris in cabinet below make line. -Crumbs at bottom interior of 2 door refrigerator near fry line. -Debris at bottom interior of shelf at register.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use trays/containers were not stored inverted at top of microwave, top of make line and at back prep table next to the 2 door refrigerator.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Worn/peeling ceiling tiles above make line. -Damaged/loose floor tile at mop sink.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Oil/debris at floor and corners fryer station. -Dust build up at ceiling vents in back room. -Floor debris in walk in freezer, specifically under shelves.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
